      * This follows Single Responsibility Principle (SRP) by focusing
      * solely on optimization-related configuration.
      *
     … +103 lines (ctrl+o to expand)

❯ 진행률을 점검하고 미진한 부분, 누락된 작업, 남은 리스크를 리스트업한 뒤 우선순위 높은 것부터 진행해보자.

● 7단계: 통합 CompilerConfiguration 인터페이스 생성

● Write(src/main/java/com/android/tools/r8/config/CompilerConfiguration.java)

  1 tasks (0 done, 1 in progress, 0 open)
  ◼ InternalOptions 분리 설계

──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
 Create file
 src/main/java/com/android/tools/r8/config/CompilerConfiguration.java
╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌
 // Copyright (c) 2025, the R8 project authors. Please see the AUTHORS file
 // for details. All rights reserved. Use of this source code is governed by a
 // BSD-style license that can be found in the LICENSE file.
 package com.android.tools.r8.config;

 /**
  * Unified configuration interface combining all compiler configuration aspects.
  * This follows Interface Segregation Principle (ISP) and Composite Pattern
  * to provide a unified view while allowing individual configuration access.
  *
  * <p>Architecture Benefits:
  * <ul>
  *   <li><b>Low Coupling</b>: Consumers depend only on required sub-configurations</li>
  *   <li><b>High Cohesion</b>: Related settings are grouped logically</li>
  *   <li><b>Extensibility</b>: New configurations can be added without breaking changes</li>
  *   <li><b>Testability</b>: Easy to mock individual configurations</li>
  * </ul>
  *
  * <p>Usage Example:
  * <pre>{@code
  * // Access only compilation settings (reduces coupling)
  * CompilationConfiguration compilation = config.getCompilationConfig();
  * if (compilation.isDebug()) { ... }
  *
  * // Access only optimization settings
  * OptimizationConfiguration optimization = config.getOptimizationConfig();
  * if (optimization.isTreeShakingEnabled()) { ... }
  * }</pre>
  *
  * <p>Migration Strategy:
  * <ol>
  *   <li>InternalOptions implements CompilerConfiguration</li>
  *   <li>Consumers gradually migrate to using sub-interfaces</li>
  *   <li>Eventually InternalOptions becomes a facade</li>
  * </ol>
  */
 public interface CompilerConfiguration
     extends CompilationConfiguration,
         OptimizationConfiguration,
         DesugaringConfiguration,
         ThreadingConfiguration,
         ApiLevelConfiguration,
         ConsumerConfiguration {

   /**
    * Returns the compilation configuration.
    * Use this when you only need compilation-related settings.
    */
   default CompilationConfiguration getCompilationConfig() {
     return this;
   }

   /**
    * Returns the optimization configuration.
    * Use this when you only need optimization-related settings.
    */
   default OptimizationConfiguration getOptimizationConfig() {
     return this;
   }

   /**
    * Returns the desugaring configuration.
    * Use this when you only need desugaring-related settings.
    */
   default DesugaringConfiguration getDesugaringConfig() {
     return this;
   }

   /**
    * Returns the threading configuration.
    * Use this when you only need threading-related settings.
    */
   default ThreadingConfiguration getThreadingConfig() {
     return this;
   }

   /**
    * Returns the API level configuration.
    * Use this when you only need API level-related settings.
    */
   default ApiLevelConfiguration getApiLevelConfig() {
     return this;
   }

   /**
    * Returns the consumer configuration.
    * Use this when you only need consumer-related settings.
    */
   default ConsumerConfiguration getConsumerConfig() {
     return this;
   }
 }

╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌
 Do you want to create CompilerConfiguration.java?
 ❯ 1. Yes

   3. No

 Esc to cancel · Tab to amend
